home.title: Furnace Filters Canada
home.tagline: Quality furnace filters, delivered across Canada.

apiStatus.label: API status
apiStatus.unreachable: API unreachable. Start it with “pnpm dev”.

meta.homeTitle: Furnace filters and air filters — delivered across Canada
meta.homeDescription: Find the right furnace filter by size (16x25x1, 20x25x4…) and MERV rating. Quality filters, shipped fast anywhere in Canada.
meta.sizesDescription: Every furnace filter size in stock: 1", 4" and 5" thick. Find your exact size or its equivalent size.
meta.sizeDescription: {label} furnace filters in stock — MERV {mervList} ratings. Actual dimensions {actual}. Shipping across Canada.
meta.categoryFallbackDescription: Shop {name} at Furnace Filters Canada — quality filters delivered across Canada.

a11y.cartLink: Cart, {count, plural, =0 {empty} one {# item} other {# items}}

footer.tagline: Quality furnace filters, shipped fast across Canada.
footer.legal: © {year} Furnace Filters Canada / Filtration Montréal. All rights reserved.

home.heroTitle: The right filter, in the right size
home.heroSubtitle: Search by dimension — nominal or actual — and find your furnace filter in seconds.

usp.shippingText: Fast shipping from Montréal, parcel tracking included.
usp.sizesText: From 12x12x1 to 25x25x5 — including actual dimensions and equivalents.
usp.mervText: MERV 8 to 13: pick the right balance between filtration and airflow.

listing.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No products} one {# product} other {# products}}{hasMore, select, true { and more} other {}}
listing.noResultsTip: Try another size or remove a filter — or check the equivalent sizes.
listing.unavailableText: Please try again in a moment — we're restoring the connection.

product.reviews: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}

sizes.title: Furnace filters by size
sizes.intro: Find your size — it's printed on the frame of your current filter. Can't see yours? Search with the actual dimensions and we'll match it.

size.title: {label} furnace filter
size.intro: {count, plural, one {# filter available} other {# filters available}} in {label}, MERV {mervList} ratings.
size.actualNote: The nominal size {label} corresponds to actual dimensions of about {actual} — that's normal: filters run slightly small so they slide easily into the slot.
size.noProducts: No products in this size at the moment.

search.title: Search
search.tip: Tip: search by size (16x25x1 — actual dimensions work too), product name or item #.
search.empty: Enter a size, product name or item #.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: This page doesn't exist or has moved. The filter you're looking for is only a few clicks away.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.taxesAtCheckout: Shipping and taxes are calculated at checkout. Shipping is free across Canada.
cart.loadError: We could not load your cart. Check your connection, then try again.
cart.updateError: The cart could not be updated. Please try again.
cart.removedUnavailable: {name} was removed from your cart: it is no longer available.
cart.removedOutOfStock: {name} was removed from your cart: it is out of stock.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emailHelp: Order confirmation and receipt will be sent to this address.
checkout.invalidZip: Enter a valid ZIP code (12345 or 12345-6789).
checkout.paymentUnavailable: Online payment is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
checkout.paymentNotConfigured: Online payment is not enabled on this environment.
checkout.secureNotice: Payment is processed securely by Stripe. Your card details never reach our servers.
checkout.cartChanged: Your cart just changed (availability or price). Review the summary below, then try again.

couponErrors.COUPON_INACTIVE: This promo code is no longer active.
couponErrors.COUPON_NOT_STARTED: This promo code is not active yet.
couponErrors.COUPON_EXHAUSTED: This promo code has reached its usage limit.
couponErrors.COUPON_MIN_SUBTOTAL: Your subtotal does not reach the minimum for this code.
couponErrors.COUPON_ALREADY_USED: You have already used this promo code.

checkout.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.paidTitle: Thank you! Your order is confirmed.
success.paidIntro: Order {number} — a confirmation email was sent to {email}.
success.processingIntro: Your payment is being processed. This page will update automatically.
success.failedIntro: Your payment could not be completed. No amount was charged.
success.failedRetry: Return to checkout to try again.
success.cancelledStockIntro: The last unit sold out while your payment was completing. Your order {number} was cancelled and fully refunded — the refund appears on your statement within a few business days.
success.invalidIntro: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.

signin.heading: Sign in
signin.intro: Sign in to view your orders.

account.invoicePending: Invoice is being prepared — try again shortly.
account.cancelConfirm: Cancel this order? It will be fully refunded.

shipments.title: My packages
shipments.emptyHint: As soon as an order ships, its tracking shows up here — across all carriers.
shipments.noEvents: No tracking events yet — the carrier has not scanned the package.

login.title: Administration
login.subtitle: Staff only. Two-factor authentication is required.
login.mfaSubtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app (or a recovery code).
login.errorMfaRequired: This account must first enable two-factor authentication (customer area).
login.apiUnreachable: API unreachable — start it with “pnpm dev”.

stepUp.title: Confirmation required
stepUp.subtitle: This sensitive action requires re-verification. Enter your authentication code.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Today at a glance.
dashboard.sectionsHint: Catalog, Orders, Marketing and other modules will plug in here.

shipstation.title: ShipStation sync
shipstation.subtitle: Orders pushed to ShipStation, and those whose sync failed.
shipstation.notConfigured: ShipStation API keys are not configured on this server: paid orders stay queued and will be pushed as soon as the keys are in place.
shipstation.hint: “Push again” replays the operation. Creation is idempotent: ShipStation will never receive a duplicate order.

users.title: Staff accounts
users.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {email}? Their sessions will be revoked immediately.

invitation.title: Activate your access
invitation.subtitle: Choose a password to activate your staff account.
invitation.success: Account activated. Enable two-factor authentication, then sign in.
invitation.mfaReminder: Reminder: admin access requires enabling two-factor authentication after this step.

mobile.tagline: Quality furnace filters, delivered across Canada.
